summary: Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ:STX) is among the stocks with the best earnings growth for the next 3 years. headline: Seagate’s C-Suite Just Sold Stock. It’s Not the Signal You Think.
summary: On the surface, a flurry of insider selling at  Seagate Technology  looks like a textbook case of corporate leaders rushing to lock in gains.  CEO William Mosley and Chief Technology Officer Gianluca Romano were among the high-ranking insiders to sell stock on June 12.  Mosley sold 1,768.25 shares—the amount includes fractional shares—for $880.19 apiece, leaving him with a direct holding of 327,517 shares.
